testcase.name: contextLoads
testcase.system-out:
18:20:12.081 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.example.launch4jdemo.Launch4jSpringDemoApplicationTest]: Launch4jSpringDemoApplicationTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 18:20:12.172 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.example.launch4jdemo.Launch4jSpringDemoApplication for test class com.example.launch4jdemo.Launch4jSpringDemoApplicationTest
. ____ _ __ _ _ /\\ / ___'_ __ _ _(_)_ __ __ _ \ \ \ \ ( ( )\___ | '_ | '_| | '_ \/ _` | \ \ \ \ \\/ ___)| |_)| | | | | || (_| | ) ) ) ) ' |____| .__|_| |_|_| |_\__, | / / / / =========|_|==============|___/=/_/_/_/
:: Spring Boot :: (v3.4.1)
2026-04-26T18:20:12.487+08:00 INFO 32688 --- [launch4j-spring-demo] [ main] c.e.l.Launch4jSpringDemoApplicationTest : Starting Launch4jSpringDemoApplicationTest using Java 21.0.10 with PID 32688 (started by 16555 in D:\mywork\techdoc\服务部署文档\最终安装过程\制作安装程序\安装模拟\launch4j-spring-demo) 2026-04-26T18:20:12.487+08:00 INFO 32688 --- [launch4j-spring-demo] [ main] c.e.l.Launch4jSpringDemoApplicationTest : No active profile set, falling back to 1 default profile: "default" 2026-04-26T18:20:13.802+08:00 INFO 32688 --- [launch4j-spring-demo] [ main] o.s.b.a.e.web.EndpointLinksResolver : Exposing 2 endpoints beneath base path '/actuator' 2026-04-26T18:20:13.850+08:00 INFO 32688 --- [launch4j-spring-demo] [ main] c.e.l.Launch4jSpringDemoApplicationTest : Started Launch4jSpringDemoApplicationTest in 1.576 seconds (process running for 2.231)
testcase.system-err: Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker. This will no longer work in future releases of the JDK. Please add Mockito as an agent to your build what is described in Mockito's documentation: https://javadoc.io/doc/org.mockito/mockito-core/latest/org/mockito/Mockito.html#0.3 WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (D:\tools\maven_repository\net\bytebuddy\byte-buddy-agent\1.15.11\byte-buddy-agent-1.15.11.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release
